violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep area.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): counters and interior of coolers noted need cleaning
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Exhaust hood and filters noted need cleaning.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Coolers and freezers noted with no thermometers.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors walls and ceiling in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensils for ice noted not stored on a clean surface
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing sink in the back food prep area noted blocked with plastic lids.
